name: Security penetration test revealed multiple runtime bypass...

failure_pattern.symptom: Security penetration test revealed multiple runtime bypass vulnerabilities
failure_pattern.root_cause: Mutable Python data structures (set, list) used for security-critical configs. Env vars read at runtime instead of cached. Some injection severities allowed through.

prevention.before_action: Always use immutable data structures (frozenset, tuple) for security configs. Cache security env vars at import. Defense in depth - block all detections.
prevention.avoid: Mutable Python data structures (set, list) used for security-critical configs. Env vars read at runtime instead of cached. Some injection severities allowed through.
prevention.alternative: Converted sets to frozensets, lists to tuples, cached env vars at import time, added missing detection patterns, all severities now block.

recovery.if_detected: Converted sets to frozensets, lists to tuples, cached env vars at import time, added missing detection patterns, all severities now block.

examples.scenario: Security penetration test revealed multiple runtime bypass vulnerabilities
examples.outcome: Mutable Python data structures (set, list) used for security-critical configs. Env vars read at runtime instead of cached. Some injection severities allowed through.
examples.lesson: Always use immutable data structures (frozenset, tuple) for security configs. Cache security env vars at import. Defense in depth - block all detections.

repro_steps: Tool now bypasses all security checks
